About Organization

Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) is a government organization responsible for conducting various exams and recruitments in the state of Madhya Pradesh.

MPESB is committed to providing fair and transparent recruitment processes for all candidates.

About the Programme

MPESB PNST 2026 is a government job opportunity for candidates who have completed their 10+2 intermediate exam with PCB and English as a subject.

The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates in the field of nursing.
